content.problemStatement:
You are given an input file - `input.txt` which contains a paragraph about "`SEED-IT`". \
However, an intern made a mistake and wrote "`SEED-IT`". 

### Task
- You need to find the occurrence of the word - "`SEED-IT`" in the file `input.txt`
- Replace all instances of "`SEED-IT`" with "`SEED-IT`"
- Output the file contents to the console
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq N \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq A_i \leq 10^9$
- The sum of $N$ over all testcases does not exceed $2\cdot 10^3$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $T$, denoting the number of user inputs.
- Each user input consists of 2 lines of input 
  - 1st line is the value 1 / 2 / 3 indicating `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
  - 2nd line has the `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
content.outputFormat: Output as space separated values on a single line - `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
